mapper.insert: INSERT INTO financial_derived_metrics ( stock_cd, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, period_end_dt, revenue_yoy, revenue_qoq, fcf_yoy, ocf_yoy, ni_ocf_gap, dso, dio, gross_margin, op_margin, fcf_margin, capex_to_depreciation, rd_intensity, sga_intensity, net_debt_to_ebitda ) VALUES ( #{stockCd}, #{fiscalYear}, #{fiscalQuarter}, #{periodEndDt}, #{revenueYoy}, #{revenueQoq}, #{fcfYoy}, #{ocfYoy}, #{niOcfGap}, #{dso}, #{dio}, #{grossMargin}, #{opMargin}, #{fcfMargin}, #{capexToDepreciation}, #{rdIntensity}, #{sgaIntensity}, #{netDebtToEbitda} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE revenue_yoy = VALUES(revenue_yoy), revenue_qoq = VALUES(revenue_qoq), fcf_yoy = VALUES(fcf_yoy), ocf_yoy = VALUES(ocf_yoy), ni_ocf_gap = VALUES(ni_ocf_gap), dso = VALUES(dso), dio = VALUES(dio), gross_margin = VALUES(gross_margin), op_margin = VALUES(op_margin), fcf_margin = VALUES(fcf_margin), capex_to_depreciation = VALUES(capex_to_depreciation), rd_intensity = VALUES(rd_intensity), sga_intensity = VALUES(sga_intensity), net_debt_to_ebitda = VALUES(net_debt_to_ebitda), upd_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id , stock_cd , fiscal_year , fiscal_quarter , period_end_dt , revenue_yoy , revenue_qoq , fcf_yoy , ocf_yoy , ni_ocf_gap , dso , dio , gross_margin , op_margin , fcf_margin , capex_to_depreciation , rd_intensity , sga_intensity , net_debt_to_ebitda , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM financial_derived_metrics WHERE stock_cd = #{stockCd} ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC LIMIT #{limit}
